features.description: Go bridge Dockerfile and docker-compose — build upstream whatsapp-bridge from source in Docker with store/ volume mount and port 8080 exposed
features.acceptance: docker compose up whatsapp-bridge builds successfully, container starts and prints QR code to logs

features.description: QR auth flow — run bridge interactively, scan QR, verify session persists in store/whatsapp.db across container restarts
features.acceptance: After scanning QR once, docker compose down && docker compose up reconnects without QR prompt

features.description: Python MCP server scaffolding — src/whatsapp/mcp_server.py with FastMCP, stdio transport, reads store/messages.db directly via SQLite
features.acceptance: Server starts via python src/whatsapp/mcp_server.py, connects to SQLite, and responds to MCP tool list request

features.description: MCP read tools — list_chats, list_messages (with filters: chat_jid, after, before, query, limit), search_contacts, get_chat
features.acceptance: Each tool returns correct data from messages.db when invoked via MCP stdio

features.description: MCP send tools — send_message and send_file that POST to Go bridge localhost:8081/api/send
features.acceptance: Sending a test message via MCP tool delivers it to the target WhatsApp chat

features.description: Claude Code MCP integration — register whatsapp server in .mcp.json with stdio command, verify tools appear in Claude Code
features.acceptance: Claude Code shows whatsapp MCP tools in tool list, can call list_chats successfully

features.description: Cowork plugin integration — add whatsapp MCP tools to pete-pa plugin allowed-tools, update commands to use MCP tools instead of browser automation for WhatsApp
features.acceptance: pete-pa commands can read WhatsApp messages and post replies via MCP tools instead of Chrome extension

features.description: Startup script — single launch script that starts Docker bridge + verifies auth, then confirms MCP server is ready
features.acceptance: Running ./start-whatsapp.sh brings up the bridge and validates connectivity end-to-end
